title: Google Play Store Scraper
description: Scrape Google Play apps and reviews by app ID, search keyword, or category. No login or API key required.

appIds.title: App Package IDs
appIds.description: Google Play package names (e.g. "com.openai.chatgpt") or full Play Store URLs.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Keywords to search on Google Play. Matching apps are scraped in full.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Google Play category codes to browse (e.g. "SOCIAL", "GAME_ACTION", "PRODUCTIVITY").

includeReviews.title: Include Reviews
includeReviews.description: If enabled, top reviews for each app are also scraped.

maxReviewsPerApp.title: Max Reviews Per App
maxReviewsPerApp.description: Maximum reviews to extract per app (when 'Include Reviews' is on).

maxResults.title: Max Apps
maxResults.description: Maximum number of apps to scrape in total across IDs, keywords, and categories. Use 1-5 for a quick test.

country.title: Country
country.description: Two-letter country code for the Play storefront (e.g. "us", "gb", "in").

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Google Play is generally accessible; enable proxies to avoid rate limits on large runs.
